theme_archetype.reasoning: Food apps require warmth, comfort, and appetizing visuals. Dark mode can feel sterile for home-cooked meals. A premium light theme with cream backgrounds builds trust, while orange/green accents stimulate appetite and indicate freshness.

tech_stack_constraints.file_extensions: CRITICAL: Use .js or .jsx extensions exclusively. Do NOT use .ts or .tsx files as the environment does not support them.
tech_stack_constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS + Custom HTML elements for creative layouts. Shadcn UI strictly for interactive logic (Dialogs, Calendars, Selects) heavily customized via Tailwind.

background.usage: Use as the primary app background.

accent.usage: Use green strictly for veg indicators, active subscription states, and payment success.

headings.description: Modern geometric sans-serif for premium, friendly tech feel.

body.family: Plus Jakarta Sans, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif
body.description: Highly legible, slightly organic sans-serif for dense app data.

layout_and_spacing.global_strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than default Bootstrap. Containers must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) if bordered.

desktop_architecture.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar (w-64 or w-72) for global navigation.
desktop_architecture.center_feed: Main scrollable area, max-w-[600px] mx-auto, mimicking a mobile feed but optimized for desktop.
desktop_architecture.right_gutter: Fixed right panel (w-80) for Wallet, Upcoming Deliveries, and active subscription stats.

mobile_architecture.header: Sticky top header (z-50) with Location, Notifications, Avatar. Must use Crystal Glassmorphism.
mobile_architecture.bottom_nav: Floating Frosted Glass tab bar (z-50) inset from edges (mb-4 mx-4 rounded-full).

layout_and_spacing.grids: MODE B (The Control Room Grid) for dashboards/admin. Use tight gaps (gap-4) and strictly align widget bottoms. Use MODE A (Tetris) for landing/marketing.

nav_and_headers.classes: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border-b border-black/5 shadow-sm

meal_cards.classes: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-black/5 overflow-hidden transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)]

motion_and_interactions.global: Spring-based physics (using framer-motion). Snappy, optimistic UI.
motion_and_interactions.meal_card: On tap/click: subtle scale down (scale-95) then pop up.
motion_and_interactions.calendar: Pop animations for pause/resume toggles. Color transitions from Green (Active) to Gray (Paused).
motion_and_interactions.success_states: Confetti bursts on payment success. Micro-animations on 'Add to Cart' (price bounce).
motion_and_interactions.drawers: Drag-to-dismiss functionality for all mobile bottom sheets.

shadcn_overrides.button: Rounded-full for primary CTAs (Apple style). Heavy padding (px-8 py-4 for main actions).
shadcn_overrides.tabs: Override fixed height. Use pill-shaped active states with subtle orange background.
shadcn_overrides.calendar: Custom day cells. Highlight active delivery days with a soft green dot/border. Strike-through or gray-out paused days.
shadcn_overrides.drawer: Must be used heavily for mobile layouts instead of center modals.

components.forms: Float labels or clean bordered inputs. Focus states must have high contrast ring (ring-orange-500).

media.rules: CRITICAL: Never use placeholder text for images. Always use provided URLs. Images must have appropriate max-heights on mobile to prevent blocking content.

hero_meal.description: Table topped with plates of food, perfect for the main marketing hero or empty state background.

fresh_prep.description: Hand squeezing lime over salad. Great for 'Fresh Ingredients' section or onboarding.

meal_card_placeholder.description: Salad with sauce. Default placeholder for daily tiffin menu items.

delivery_partner.description: Cheerful delivery person. Use for the Delivery Partner app onboarding or tracking screens.

testing.attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., data-testid='pause-subscription-button').

icons_library.name: lucide-react
icons_library.instructions: Already installed. Use for standard UI icons. Use solid filled variations for active bottom nav states.
